evidence.mechanism: Context-dependent phenotype realization allows metabolic efficiency to vary based on local ecological conditions
testCoverage: Fertility modulation increases efficiency in high-fertility contexts
Crowding modulation decreases efficiency under crowding
Disturbance modulation decreases efficiency during disturbance events
Backward compatible when no context is provided

differences.directEncoding: Traits are read directly from genotype as fixed scalars
differences.contextDependent: Traits are modulated by local environmental context (fertility, crowding, disturbance) at phenotype realization time

limitationsAndFuture: Current implementation only modulates metabolic efficiency
Could extend to other traits (harvest efficiency, movement bias, reproduction threshold)
Could test whether context-conditioned phenotypes rescue policy-bearing cohorts under matched controls
